checks.name: status_ok
checks.message: form status must be ok

checks.name: mode
checks.message: form mode must be local browser-only

checks.name: template_source
checks.message: form must read source_capture_ledger.fill-template.csv

checks.name: row_count
checks.message: form must cover exactly 24 P1 outcome rows

checks.name: event_type_count
checks.message: form must cover link_click, lead_submit, deal, and quality_flag

checks.name: download_filename
checks.message: form must export source_capture_ledger.filled.csv

checks.name: browser_only
checks.message: form must be browser-only

checks.name: browser_persistence_false
checks.message: form must not persist browser data

checks.name: network_false
checks.message: form status must declare no network calls

checks.name: live_input_false
checks.message: form must not create live input files

checks.name: event_write_false
checks.message: form must not write data/lp_events.jsonl

checks.name: external_false
checks.message: form must not claim external effects

checks.name: html_title
checks.message: HTML must include the form title

checks.name: html_no_external_effect
checks.message: HTML must mark no external effect

checks.name: html_no_network_marker
checks.message: HTML must mark no network

checks.name: html_mentions_download
checks.message: HTML must mention the download filename

checks.name: html_has_form
checks.message: HTML must include a local owner form with no action

checks.name: html_no_form_action
checks.message: HTML form must not define an action URL

checks.name: html_download_control
checks.message: HTML must include CSV download control

checks.name: html_no_fetch
checks.message: HTML must not call fetch

checks.name: html_no_xhr
checks.message: HTML must not send beacons or XHR

checks.name: html_no_persistence
checks.message: HTML must not use browser persistence APIs

checks.name: html_no_external_links
checks.message: HTML must not link to external URLs

checks.name: quality_score_guard
checks.message: HTML must restrict quality_score to quality_flag rows

checks.name: required_headers
checks.message: template must include all owner-required fields

checks.name: real_events_unchanged
checks.message: fixture guard must not change data/lp_events.jsonl

note: Static local guard for the North Star outcome browser form. It inspects the generated HTML/status contract only and never creates live CSVs, appends data/lp_events.jsonl, stages/applies data, deploys, posts, pushes LINE/GitHub, mutates customer data, touches payments, or deletes data.
